veg_rules.note: If is_veg=true, any ingredient matching non_veg_keywords must be excluded. Also validate AI output does not contain these terms.

synergy_pairs.note: Can be used to make homemade paneer (chenna). Don't discard this combo.
Classic sandwich or French toast combination.
Smoothie or milkshake — no cooking required.
Stir-fry or tikka — dry preparation works well.
Classic curry base — can be used for any gravy dish.

conflict_pairs.note: Traditionally discouraged in Ayurveda. Suggest using them separately.
Equal proportions are traditionally avoided — use different ratios.

few_shot_examples.note: Vary based on spice level and preference
Protein-rich, adapt sauce based on cuisine style
Base for many curries or standalone soup
Rice-dominant dish with egg mixed in
Non-veg — only suitable if is_veg is false
Synergy pair — milk curdles with lemon to make paneer

Gujarati.prefer: dal, sabzi, khichdi, rotli, shaak, undhiyu

Street Food.prefer: chaat, pav bhaji, vada pav, sandwiches, rolls, bhel

South Indian.prefer: dosa, sambar, rasam, rice dishes, coconut chutneys, uttapam

Punjabi.prefer: dal makhani, butter chicken, rajma, parathas, lassi

Breakfast.prefer: toast, omelettes, poha, upma, smoothies, sandwiches

Healthy.prefer: salads, soups, grilled dishes, steamed items, smoothies

Bengali.flavor: mustard oil, panch phoron, subtle sweetness, fish-friendly
Bengali.avoid: Punjabi-style heavy cream gravies unless adapted
Bengali.prefer: shorshe, jhol, begun bhaja, light fish or veg curries, rice

Rajasthani.flavor: robust, dried spices, gram flour, tangy chutneys, low moisture
Rajasthani.prefer: gatte ki sabzi, ker sangri, dal baati, bajra roti, pickles

Italian.flavor: herbs (basil, oregano), olive oil, tomato, garlic, cheese
Italian.avoid: garam masala–heavy Indian gravies unless fusion is requested
Italian.prefer: pasta, risotto-style rice dishes, simple salads, grilled veg

Chinese.flavor: soy, ginger-garlic, high heat stir-fry, sesame
Chinese.avoid: slow dairy-heavy Indian curries as default
Chinese.prefer: stir-fry, fried rice style, noodles, quick wok dishes

Indo-Chinese.flavor: Indian-Chinese fusion — soy, chilli, capsicum, cornflour gloss
Indo-Chinese.prefer: hakka noodles, manchurian-style gravies, fried rice, chilli dishes

Mexican.flavor: lime, cumin, beans, corn, fresh salsa, mild–hot chillies
Mexican.prefer: bowls, wraps, bean stews, simple grilled fillings

combination_logic.note: When base + protein present, make a full meal. Base + flavor = snack. Protein alone = protein-focused dish.
